message:
feat(groupby,types): add nunique, prod, and size aggregation functions

Extend groupby aggregation with three new functions matching pandas:

fp-groupby:
- Add AggFunc variants: Nunique, Prod, Size
- Track total_count per group (including nulls) alongside non-null values
  for Size aggregation which counts all rows, not just non-null
- Wire new variants through suffix naming and aggregation dispatch

fp-types:
- nanprod: multiply non-missing values, return 1.0 for empty input
  (matching pandas empty product convention)
- nannunique: count unique non-missing values using debug-repr hashing
  for type-agnostic uniqueness detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
